title: Invasion
content:
Decline already - 
    But that was quick...
    Hardly a trace of rising - 
    I have grown above the whole world.
    I have become the complete God
    And horribly awake.
    And now I must cast away death.
    My death is mute
    And without images...
    Without redemption -
meaning:
"Invasion" is a quintessential example of Alfred Lichtenstein's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
